body.title: CLOSED: Create the Librarian rack device — always-on rack agent skeleton
body.result: Librarian BaseDevice skeleton — rack contract, MCP stdio stub, OOK, 19 tests, 6b6a31e
body.description:
Create the Librarian as a first-class rack device in agent_datacenter. The Librarian IS the rack-minion — that label is retired. Runs whenever the rack is running. Independent of Igor being up.

Responsibilities (phased — this ticket is the skeleton):
- BaseDevice subclass with full rack contract (health, lifecycle, comms://)
- MCP server surface (stdio) so CC can connect and call tools
- IMAP/bus channel for inter-agent comms (Igor, other rack devices)
- Web/channel interface so Akien can chat to it directly
- Internal constant: OOK = 'Ook.' (Discworld canon; the Librarian's only word)

Does NOT include inference routing or tool inventory in this ticket — those are follow-on.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/__init__.py, agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/librarian.py, agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/mcp_server.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; BaseDevice contract; bus/ owns comms:// routing
**Scope boundary:** skeleton + interfaces only; no tool implementations yet
**Test plan:** BaseDevice contract satisfied; MCP server starts and lists tools (empty); health() returns healthy
